calendar.matters:
DEMURRER to Amended PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Sep-23-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Austin M. Yang; Deputy City Attorney; 415-554-6761; appearing via Zoom on behalf of repondents City and County of San Francisco and The Office of Short Term Rentals.
Katherine L. Alphonso; Kaufman Dolowich & Voluck, LLP; 415-926-7600; appearing via Zoom on behalf of petitioner Jason Gill.
Tad A. Devlin; Kaufman Dolowich & Voluck, LLP; 415-926-7600; appearing via Zoom on behalf of petitioner Jason Gill.
Jason Gill; Petitioner in attendance via Zoom with their counsel of record.

Hearing held. Petitioner's declaration in support of their proposed amendment is discussed. Respondents argue that the petitioner's proposed amended petition fails to state a cause of action and request the court to sustain demurrer without leave to amend. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

RESPONDENTS OFFICE OF SHORT TERM RENTALS AND CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION is sustained with leave to amend for petitioner to allege in good faith that the third-floor bedroom was legal at all relevant times.

Respondents to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to Amended PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Sep-09-2021 Continued To Sep-23-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

RESPONDENT OFFICE OF SHORT TERM RENTALS, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER to Amended PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION is continued to September 23, 2021 per stipulation and order.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
